creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Lizbeth Mutterhunt, Ph.D. from comment #0)

> plasmashell --version:
> plasmashell 5.24.5

Here: 

% plasmashell --version
libGL error: failed to authenticate magic 1
libGL error: failed to load driver: r600
plasmashell 5.24.5
% sysrc kld_list
kld_list: fusefs radeonkms filemon
%
